mdSummary:
# ImageCompare

Before/after slider comparison for two images.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/image-compare

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ImageCompare | BeforeSrc | `string` | `""` |  |
| ImageCompare | AfterSrc | `string` | `""` |  |
| ImageCompare | BeforeLabel | `string?` | `"Before"` |  |
| ImageCompare | AfterLabel | `string?` | `"After"` |  |
| ImageCompare | InitialPosition | `int` | `50` |  |
| ImageCompare | Width | `string` | `"100%"` |  |
| ImageCompare | Height | `string` | `"400px"` |  |
| ImageCompare | Orientation | `ImageCompareOrientation` | `ImageCompareOrientation.Horizontal` |  |
| ImageCompare | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ImageCompare | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
